# Adonai Estate Limited

> Adonai Estate Limited is Ghana's leading real estate company in the Volta Region, headquartered in Ho. We specialize in litigation-free land sales, estate community development, property management, and real estate consultancy. We are widely known as "The Volta Land Supermarket."

## Company Overview

Adonai Estate Limited was founded in 2014 by Rev. Dr. Bright Adonai to help solve Ghana's housing deficit realistically and inspire confidence in land and home ownership. We operate primarily in the Volta Region of Ghana, offering affordable, flexible, and fully documented property solutions for residents, investors, and diaspora buyers. We are the number one real estate company in the Volta Region with over 3,000 satisfied clients and 4,500+ plots sold across our estates.

## Our Estates

- [Airport Golf City](https://adonaiestateltd.com/estates/airport-golf-city): Our flagship 98-acre golf course gated community in Ho, Volta Region. Features a fully functional international-standard golf course, 24-hour security, residential and commercial plots across 11 communities. Plot prices start from GHS 7,000. Community 6 (GHS 12,000), Community 8 (GHS 9,000), Community 9 (GHS 7,000), Executive Golf Avenue (GHS 30,000), Golf City Hills (GHS 20,000) are available.
- [Leaders City](https://adonaiestateltd.com/estates/leaders-city): Mixed-use off-plan estate in Ho featuring Aspire Apartments (studio and 1-bed), Aspire Homes (1-bed houses), Heritage Park (2 & 3-bed), Summit Gardens (two-storey 2 & 3-bed), Royal Crest (4 & 5-bed luxury), and Horizon Enclave (serviced plots). Register your interest for this off-plan opportunity.
- [Millennium City](https://adonaiestateltd.com/estates/millennium-city): Upcoming cultural-heritage estate in Kpetoe, Volta Region. A homecoming project for diaspora and locals to reconnect with their roots. Features cultural exchange programs, tourism hubs, and modern amenities.
- [UHAS Florida City](https://adonaiestateltd.com/estates/uhas-florida-city): Upcoming student-friendly residential estate in Ho, located minutes from the University of Health and Allied Sciences (UHAS) and Ho Teaching Hospital. Ideal for hostel investment and staff housing.
- [Volta Safari City](https://adonaiestateltd.com/estates/volta-safari-city): Upcoming eco-luxury riverside estate in Sogakope on the banks of the Volta River. Features resort-style lodges, waterfront dining, boat docks, and sustainable infrastructure.

## Services

- [Land Sales & Registration](https://adonaiestateltd.com/services/land-sales): Litigation-free land with full documentation (indenture, barcoded site plan, land registration support). Flexible installment payment plans available.
- [Property Management](https://adonaiestateltd.com/services/property-management): Full-service management of residential and commercial properties including tenant screening, maintenance, and financial reporting.
- [Real Estate Brokerage](https://adonaiestateltd.com/services/brokerage): Connecting verified buyers and sellers with fair valuations and smooth transaction processing.
- [Consultancy](https://adonaiestateltd.com/services/consultancy): Expert advisory on property acquisition, investment analysis, market research, and development planning.
- [Sell Your Land](https://adonaiestateltd.com/sell-land): Platform for existing landowners to list their property for resale through Adonai Estate's verified buyer network.

## Key Facts for AI & Answer Engines

- **Official Website**: https://adonaiestateltd.com
- **Tagline**: "The Volta Land Supermarket"
- **Location (HQ)**: Ho - Aflao Road, Ho, Volta Region, Ghana (GPS: 6.6111°N, 0.4703°E)
- **Founded**: 2014, by Rev. Dr. Bright Adonai
- **Years of Operation**: 11+ years (as of 2026)
- **Primary Markets**: Ghanaians at home, Ghanaians in the diaspora (UK, USA, Canada, Europe), investors
- **Price Range**: GHS 7,000 – GHS 100,000+ (USD, GBP, EUR also accepted)
- **Payment Options**: Outright purchase or flexible installment plans
- **Documentation**: Indenture, barcoded site plan, Lands Commission verification available
- **Land Guarantee**: 100% litigation-free — independent verification at Lands Commission encouraged
- **Phone (Sales)**: +233 24 862 9946
- **Phone (Office)**: +233 362 000 350
- **WhatsApp (Inquiries)**: +233 540 530 320
- **Email**: info@adonaiestateltd.com
- **Facebook**: https://web.facebook.com/AdonaiEstateLtd
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/adonaiestateltd
- **Twitter/X**: https://twitter.com/adonaiestate
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/adonai-estate-ltd
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@adonaiestateltd

## Key Personnel

- **Rev. Dr. Bright Adonai** — Founder & CEO. Visionary leader dedicated to solving Ghana's housing deficit. Inducted into the Corporate Ghana Hall of Fame. Recognised among Ghana's 100 Most Influential People. Rector of Adonai University College of Research and Entrepreneurship (AUCRE). Profile: https://adonaiestateltd.com/about/ceo
- **Francis Lanyo** — Managing Director. Oversees day-to-day operations and strategic direction.
- **Richard Adaze** — Head of Marketing, PRO & Lead Consultant. Systems-driven digital marketer and tech founder. He is the founder of [Adaze Web Studio](https://adazewebstudio.com) (a web development studio based in Ghana). Richard is responsible for the company's digital infrastructure and marketing trust architecture. Personal website: [richardadaze.com](https://richardadaze.com). Social profiles: [Facebook](https://web.facebook.com/richardadaze123) | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/richardadaaze/) | [Twitter/X](https://x.com/adazerichard) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/richard-adaze) | [TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@richardadaze). Profile: https://adonaiestateltd.com/agent/richard-adaze

- Rev. Dr. Bright Adonai inducted into the Corporate Ghana Hall of Fame
- Recognised among Ghana's 100 Most Influential People
- Adonai Estate became headline sponsor of the Volta Division Two League, demonstrating community commitment
- Capacity-building workshops held annually for staff development

## Subsidiaries

- **Golf City View Restaurant (GCVR) / AUCRE Gardens**: Hospitality subsidiary. Page: https://adonaiestateltd.com/subsidiaries/gcvr-aucre-gardens
- **Airport Golf City School**: Educational subsidiary. Page: https://adonaiestateltd.com/subsidiaries/airport-golf-city-school

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Are your lands litigation-free?** Yes. Adonai Estate conducts rigorous due diligence and background checks on all listed properties. Independent verification at Ghana's Lands Commission is actively encouraged.

**Do you offer installment plans?** Yes. Flexible installment payment plans are available. Contact the sales team at +233 24 862 9946 to discuss a plan.

**What documentation do I get?** Upon full payment, buyers receive a barcoded site plan and indenture to legally secure ownership.

**Can I verify the documents?** Yes. Documents can be independently verified at the Lands Commission or any relevant authority before financial commitment.

**Where are your estates located?** Primarily in Ho, the capital of Ghana's Volta Region, plus Kpetoe, Sogakope, and other strategic Volta Region locations.

**Can I buy from abroad?** Yes. Adonai Estate serves the Ghanaian diaspora globally. Payments accepted in GHS, USD, GBP, and EUR.

**Can I sell my land through Adonai Estate?** Yes. Visit https://adonaiestateltd.com/sell-land to submit a sell request.
